case_title: CAROL ANN GAWRYCH et al VS. GEORGE MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED JAN-07-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GEORGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAWRYCH, CAROL ANN GAWRYCH, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GEORGE $1,363.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,413.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RETURN OF $363.00 OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, AND DAMAGES OF $1000.00 FOR NON-COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.0. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GEORGE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY GAWRYCH, CAROL ANN GAWRYCH, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CAROL ANN GAWRYCH. CO-PLAINTIFF THOMAS GAWRYCH NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
